data.title: GREEN: Implement _read_latest_preconditions with LWW in ticket-lib.sh
data.description:
Implement the _read_latest_preconditions function with Last-Write-Wins semantics.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Add _read_latest_preconditions(ticket_id, gate_name, session_id) to plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh
- [ ] Scans all *-PRECONDITIONS.json files in the per-ticket event directory for matching (gate_name, session_id) composite key
- [ ] Returns the entry with the lexicographically highest timestamp prefix (ISO8601 sort = LWW)
- [ ] Returns empty/null cleanly when no matching file exists
- [ ] All tests in tests/scripts/test-preconditions-lww.sh pass GREEN

## Files to Modify
- MODIFY: plugins/dso/scripts/ticket-lib.sh (implement _read_latest_preconditions fully)

## Testing Mode
GREEN — makes T2 tests pass

## Depends On
T2 (9f94-ad77), T4 (2018-40a6)
